name: DailyMed STENDRA avanafil tablet prescribing information
authors: U.S. National Library of Medicine DailyMed
summary: U.S. STENDRA label updated July 18, 2024, covering avanafil dosing, nitrate and GC-stimulator contraindications, alpha-blocker/antihypertensive/alcohol cautions, PDE selectivity, nitrate timing, and pharmacokinetics.

access_attempts.result: Full prescribing information accessed through DailyMed.
access_attempts.notes: Used label sections 2, 4, 5, 7, and 12 for class-transfer extraction.
